profiles.name: Default (Alpine)
profiles.description: Lightweight Alpine-based image with essential tools
profiles.dockerfileTemplate:
FROM docker.io/alpine:3.19

# Install base dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache \
    curl \
    git \
    bash \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    python3 \
    py3-pip

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /workspace

# Default command
CMD ["sh"]

profiles.name: Rust
profiles.description: Official Rust image with Cargo and build tools
profiles.dockerfileTemplate:
FROM rust:trixie

# Install additional tools
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    bash \
    pkg-config \
    libssl-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /workspace

# Default command
CMD ["bash"]

profiles.name: Python
profiles.description: Official Python image with pip and common tools
profiles.dockerfileTemplate:
FROM python:3.12-slim

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    bash \
    build-essential \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Upgrade pip
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /workspace

# Default command
CMD ["bash"]

profiles.name: Go
profiles.description: Official Go image with compiler and standard tools
profiles.dockerfileTemplate:
FROM golang:1.22-alpine

# Install additional tools
RUN apk add --no-cache \
    curl \
    git \
    bash \
    gcc \
    musl-dev \
    openssl-dev

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /workspace

# Default command
CMD ["sh"]

profiles.name: Node.js
profiles.description: Official Node.js image with npm and yarn
profiles.dockerfileTemplate:
FROM node:20-slim

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    bash \
    python3 \
    make \
    g++ \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /workspace

# Default command
CMD ["bash"]

profiles.name: Elixir
profiles.description: Official Elixir image with Erlang/OTP runtime and Mix
profiles.dockerfileTemplate:
FROM elixir:otp-27-slim

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    bash \
    build-essential \
    inotify-tools \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Hex and Rebar
RUN mix local.hex --force && \
    mix local.rebar --force

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /workspace

# Default command
CMD ["bash"]
